purpose: Ruleset-aligned CCC resume engine configuration for staged planning, generation, and validation.

thin_input_triggers: no numeric evidence in source experience

notes: Under 3 years = one page hard cap
3+ years = two pages maximum, not minimum

positioning_rules.title_match: Use the exact target job title from the JD in summary sentence 1. If the current title differs, reflect the target title honestly without inventing direct experience.

requirements: Use the exact target job title in summary sentence 1
Bold the target role title with HTML <b> tags
Bold the strongest proof point or metric with HTML <b> tags
Use exact JD wording where natural
Sentence 3 should foreground exact JD terminology for key hard skills
Summary must render as exactly 4 lines in the final output

bullet_requirements: Every bullet must begin with a bold lead phrase using HTML <b> tags
Bullets must explain action plus business or operational significance
Prefer metrics when grounded in source evidence

requirements: Use exact JD terminology where possible
Return skills as a category-to-string mapping for renderer compatibility
Languages should be included in the final skills block as a category if relevant
LLM should choose the final category labels, items, and order before validator cleanup
Skills should be in final recruiter-facing form at generation time
validator_behavior: preserve llm category order when possible
trim excess rows without rewriting the surviving categories
drop clearly unsupported skill items when necessary

keep_when: explicitly named or clearly implied by the JD
recognised issuer or strong role relevance
date or in-progress timing is present
drop_when: weak role relevance on one-page build

truthfulness_rules: Do not invent employers, promotions, credentials, tools, languages, or metrics
Do not claim direct domain expertise that the profile does not support
Use transferable framing honestly when the fit is adjacent
If evidence is thin, strengthen wording through framing, not fabrication
